sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁשׂה שׁסה

Transliteration: shâsâh shâśâh

Phonetic: shaw-saw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to spoil, plunder, take spoil
    1. (Qal)
      1. to plunder
      2. plunderers (participle)
    2. (Poel) to plunder

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2425

Part(s) of speech: Verb
